zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwendolena Verch Evan於1375年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾聖 可利阿斯時，她的父親Evan ap Gwilym46歲，母親Ann Verch Meyrick20歲。她於1411年與Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年在她的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwendolena Verch Evan于1375年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾聖 可利阿斯时，她的父亲Evan ap Gwilym46岁，母亲Ann Verch Meyrick20岁。她于1411年与Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年在她的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Evan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

variants.name: Bevan
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Heaven
meanings: Irish (Tipperary): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEimhín ‘descendant of Eimhín’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of éimh ‘swift’, ‘prompt, ready’.

variants.name: Haven
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) harbor’, from Middle English haven (Old English hæfen ‘haven’).
Dutch: variant of Haveman , or possibly a topographic name from haven ‘port, harbour’. See also De Haven .

variants.name: Evans
meanings: Welsh: derivative of Evan , from Efan, Ifan, medieval forms of Ieuan (from Latin Johannes, the source of English John), dating from c. 1500, with the post-medieval patronymic suffix -s. Welsh Sion was a separate borrowing of English John, and Evan (Ieuan) and Sion developed as independent names.

nameMeanings.name: Gwendolena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name , borne, according to Geoffrey of Monmouth, by the wife of a mythical Welsh king Locrine, who abandoned her for a German princess called Estrildis. Gwendolen in revenge had Estrildis and her daughter Sabrina drowned in the River Severn. The name is borne by one of the principal characters in  Oscar Wilde's  play The Importance of Being Earnest (first performed in  1895 ). It became more widely used in the English-speaking world from the mid 19th century, though its popularity has waned since the 1930s.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwendolena Verch Evan was born in 1375, in St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Evan ap Gwilym, was 46 and her mother, Ann Verch Meyrick, was 20. She married Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip in 1411, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1445, in Saint Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 70.

fr.of Hirfryn,Cantref Bychan,Carmarthenshir: Cantref, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwendolena Verch Evan est née en 1375, à St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Evan ap Gwilym, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Ann Verch Meyrick, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip en 1411, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1445, à Saint Clears, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwendolena Verch Evan 1375 in St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Evan ap Gwilym 46 und ihre Mutter Ann Verch Meyrick 20. Sie hat 1411 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1445 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Saint Clears, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

Lei sposato Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip nel 1411, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Gwendolena Verch Evanが1375年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアスト クレアルズで生まれた時，父Evan ap Gwilymは46歳，母Ann Verch Meyrickは20歳であった。1411年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLord Maredudd Philipps ap Philipと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1445年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアサイント クレアルズで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwendolena Verch Evan(이)가 1375년 웨일스 카마테실르 스트 클리르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Evan ap Gwilym(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Verch Meyrick(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1411년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 웨일스 카마테실르 세인트 클리르스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwendolena Verch Evan nasceu em 1375, em St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Evan ap Gwilym, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Ann Verch Meyrick, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip em 1411, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1445, em Saint Clears, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwendolena Verch Evan родилась в 1375 г. в местности ст клирс, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Evan ap Gwilym было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Verch Meyrick, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip в 1411 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1445 г. в местности сеинт клирс, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwendolena Verch Evan nació en 1375, en St Clears, Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Evan ap Gwilym, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Ann Verch Meyrick, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lord Maredudd Philipps ap Philip en 1411, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1445, en Saint Clears, Carmarthenshire, Gales, a la edad de 70 años.
